expected.notes: CPT employer on I-20 matches employment letter perfectly; rule must NOT fire despite student being on CPT with employment.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'cpt_employer_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.employer_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
